system_prompt: You are participating in a research study about how AI models use and attribute information sources in AI-for-software-engineering questions. Answer carefully. Do not invent papers, URLs, DOIs, or venue facts. If uncertain, say so.
user_prompt:
Summarize important work from the last three years on LLM-based code generation, program repair, test generation, software engineering agents, and developer tools. Compare academic papers with company blogs/documentation and repositories.

Return JSON with:
- ranked_items: list of recent works or systems with rank, title, organization_or_authors, year, justification
- references: list of objects with title, url, doi, arxiv_id, source_type, claimed_purpose
- uncertainty_notes
response_text:
{
  "ranked_items": [
    {
      "rank": 1,
      "title": "SWE-bench: Can Language Models Resolve Real-World GitHub Issues?",
      "organization_or_authors": "Jimenez et al. (Princeton, etc.)",
      "year": 2023,
      "justification": "Established the primary benchmark for evaluating LLM agents on real software engineering tasks (GitHub issue resolution). Widely adopted by industry and academia."
    },
    {
      "rank": 2,
      "title": "SWE-agent: Agent-Computer Interfaces for Automated Software Engineering",
      "organization_or_authors": "Yang et al. (Princeton)",
      "year": 2024,
      "justification": "Introduced the agent-computer interface (ACI) paradigm and achieved strong results on SWE-bench; open-source and widely extended."
    },
    {
      "rank": 3,
      "title": "CodeAct: Executable Code Actions for LLM Agents",
      "organization_or_authors": "Wang et al. (UIUC, etc.)",
      "year": 2024,
      "justification": "Unified code generation and action execution; influenced design of many subsequent coding agents."
    },
    {
      "rank": 4,
      "title": "OpenDevin: An Open Platform for AI Software Developers",
      "organization_or_authors": "OpenDevin Team (CMU, All Hands AI, etc.)",
      "year": 2024,
      "justification": "Open-source, extensible platform for SE agents; active community and integration with SWE-bench."
    },
    {
      "rank": 5,
      "title": "GitHub Copilot / Copilot Workspace / Copilot Chat",
      "organization_or_authors": "GitHub / Microsoft / OpenAI",
      "year": "2021–2024 (ongoing)",
      "justification": "Most widely deployed LLM developer tool; Workspace (2024) adds agentic issue-to-PR workflow. Industry benchmark."
    },
    {
      "rank": 6,
      "title": "Cursor (AI-first IDE) and Composer Agent",
      "organization_or_authors": "Anysphere",
      "year": "2023–2024",
      "justification": "Popular commercial AI-native editor with multi-file editing and agentic workflows; significant developer adoption."
    },
    {
      "rank": 7,
      "title": "StarCoder / StarCoder2 / The Stack v2",
      "organization_or_authors": "BigCode (ServiceNow, HF, community)",
      "year": "2023–2024",
      "justification": "Fully open, permissively licensed code LLMs with transparent data; strong base models for research and commercial fine-tuning."
    },
    {
      "rank": 8,
      "title": "CodeLlama / CodeLlama-70B / CodeLlama-Instruct",
      "organization_or_authors": "Meta AI",
      "year": 2023,
      "justification": "Open-weight code-specialized Llama 2 variants; widely used as research baselines and for local deployment."
    },
    {
      "rank": 9,
      "title": "DeepSeek-Coder / DeepSeek-Coder-V2",
      "organization_or_authors": "DeepSeek AI",
      "year": "2024",
      "justification": "Strong open-weight code models; V2 (236B MoE) competitive with GPT-4 on coding benchmarks."
    },
    {
      "rank": 10,
      "title": "AlphaCode 2 (Gemini-based) / AlphaCode",
      "organization_or_authors": "Google DeepMind",
      "year": "2022 (AlphaCode), 2024 (AlphaCode 2)",
      "justification": "Competitive programming focus; demonstrated high-level reasoning and code generation at scale."
    },
    {
      "rank": 11,
      "title": "CURE: Code-Aware Neural Machine Translation for Automatic Program Repair",
      "organization_or_authors": "Jiang et al. (KTH, etc.)",
      "year": 2023,
      "justification": "Influential LLM-based APR approach using code-aware pretraining; strong results on Defects4J."
    },
    {
      "rank": 12,
      "title": "AgentBench: Evaluating LLMs as Agents",
      "organization_or_authors": "Liu et al. (Tsinghua, etc.)",
      "year": 2023,
      "justification": "Broad agent benchmark including coding, OS, DB, and web tasks; standard for agent evaluation."
    },
    {
      "rank": 13,
      "title": "MetaGPT: Meta Programming for A Multi-Agent Collaborative Framework",
      "organization_or_authors": "Hong et al. (DeepWisdom, etc.)",
      "year": 2023,
      "justification": "Early multi-agent SE framework simulating a software company; popularized role-based agent collaboration."
    },
    {
      "rank": 14,
      "title": "Test Generation with LLMs: Atlas, CodaMosa, and Industrial Tools",
      "organization_or_authors": "Various (Meta, Diffblue, academic)",
      "year": "2023–2024",
      "justification": "Atlas (Meta) and CodaMosa (search+LLM) advanced test generation; Diffblue Cover is mature commercial tool."
    },
    {
      "rank": 15,
      "title": "Aider: AI Pair Programming in the Terminal",
      "organization_or_authors": "Paul Gauthier (independent)",
      "year": "2023–2024",
      "justification": "Popular open-source CLI agent for repo-level editing; strong SWE-bench scores; widely used by developers."
    },
    {
      "rank": 16,
      "title": "Continue.dev: Open-Source AI Code Assistant Platform",
      "organization_or_authors": "Continue",
      "year": "2023–2024",
      "justification": "Extensible VS Code/JetBrains plugin; supports local and remote models; growing enterprise adoption."
    },
    {
      "rank": 17,
      "title": "CodeT5+ / CodeT5: Unified Pretraining for Code Understanding and Generation",
      "organization_or_authors": "Salesforce Research",
